title: MOSPF (Multicast Open Shortest Path First) Operation Flowchart
description: A flowchart depicting the process of how MOSPF routers build and use group membership information to calculate and forward multicast datagrams along the shortest path tree.
relationships: Router uses LSDB to build topology map
For each multicast group, Router runs Dijkstra's algorithm to compute SPT
SPT is pruned based on Group Membership information
Multicast datagram is forwarded out interfaces defined by the SPT
